name: gmod-bench
description: Find the best AI models for Garry's Mod development — public GMod Lua coding challenges and leaderboard.

scripts.lint: oxlint src tests scripts website/src website/scripts --deny-warnings
scripts.format: prettier --write src tests scripts website/src website/astro.config.ts website/wrangler.jsonc package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.scripts.json prettier.config.ts .github
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src tests scripts website/src website/astro.config.ts website/wrangler.jsonc package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.scripts.json prettier.config.ts .github
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:scripts && bun run lint && bun test && bun run website:verify
